```{r, eval = FALSE}
                                                                                           psm_var = c("DEM_AGE", "ECOG"), alltx = "drop vc",
                                                                                           response = 30, 
                                                                                           resp_type = "OPTIMUM_RESP_WH_COMB_14d", 
                                                                                           B = 300,
                                                                                           nfolds = 10, 
                                                                                           ngamma = 50, 
                                                                                           relax_me = FALSE, 
                                                                                           AA = ipw_seed[1] * 32, 
                                                                                           minnum = 5,
                                                                                           alpha_val = 0,
                                                                                           measure_type = "class", 
                                                                                           family_type = "binomial",
                                                                                           imputeme = FALSE,
                                                                                           nsample = 5
)) 
saveRDS(run_va_best_crcrh_14d_varisk_mut_catg, file  = "run_va_best_crcrh_14d_varisk_mut_catg.rds")


## MUT - mCOXr + treating allo-HCT as censored + Dynamic counterfactual 
system.time(run_va_censct_os_varisk_mut_catg_cfact <- Inter_TX_multivariate_profile_counterfact_paperML(udata = KMdata %>% mutate(time = time_sct, censor = censor_sct), 
                                                                                                  tx_type = NULL,
                                                                                                  method = "Cox-PH + Penalty + Boot",
                                                                                                  var_to_add = takem0_mut, 
                                                                                                  what = "No",
                                                                                                  alpha = 0.05, 
                                                                                                  delete_np = FALSE,
                                                                                                  delete_NP_param = TRUE,
                                                                                                  logistic =  FALSE,
                                                                                                  
                                                                                                  nnt = TRUE,
                                                                                                  nnt_var = takem0_mut, 
                                                                                                  nnt_tm = c(30, 90, 180, 365, 540), 
                                                                                                  psm = FALSE,  
                                                                                                  psm_method = "IPTW", 
                                                                                                  psm_model = NULL, 
                                                                                                  psm_var = NULL,
                                                                                                  alltx = "drop vc",
                                                                                                  
                                                                                                  response = 30, 
                                                                                                  resp_type = "OS", 
                                                                                                  B = 300,
                                                                                                  nfolds = 10, 
                                                                                                  ngamma = 50, 
                                                                                                  relax_me = FALSE, 
                                                                                                  AA = ipw_seed[1] * 44, 
                                                                                                  minnum = 5,
                                                                                                  alpha_val = 0,
                                                                                                  measure_type = "deviance", 
                                                                                                  family_type =  "cox",
                                                                                                  imputeme = FALSE,
                                                                                                  nsample = 5)) 

saveRDS(run_va_censct_os_varisk_mut_catg_cfact, file = "run_va_censct_os_varisk_mut_catg_cfact.rds")
```



# Counterfactual estimation of marginal effects of (+ve) and (-ve) for each biomarker {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

Dynamic estimation of marginal risk of death over time is obtained along with one-tailed test assessing the superiority of distribution of marginal risk of one group (e.g., +ve) relative to the other (e.g., -ve). 

```{r, eval = FALSE}
mmod <- c("censct")
trym <- c("fc", "ngs", "fish", "cyt", "mut")
title_tryme <- c("FC", "NGS", "FISH", "CYT", "AML mutation")
title_tryme2 <- c("FC_", "NGS_", "FISH_", "CYT_", "_MUTATION")
mmis <- c("catg")#, "ipw", "mice")

os_type <- "os" 
data_type <- "all" 

try(rm(mm)); try(rm(nn)); try(rm(oo))
for(mm in 1 : length(mmod)){
  for(nn in 1 :  length(trym)) {
    for(oo in 1 : length(mmis)){
      
     # mm <- oo <- nn <- 1
      
      ## deleting all files in this directory
      QQ <- paste0("setwd('/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/plots/hazard_risk/", data_type,"/missing_", mmis[oo],"/risk_", mmod[mm],"_",trym[nn],"/')")
      QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
      
    
      if(data_type == "all"){
        GG <- paste0("readRDS('/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/run_va_", mmod[mm],"_", os_type,"_varisk_", trym[nn], "_", mmis[oo],"_cfact.rds')")
        output <- GG <- eval(parse(text = GG))
      } 
      
      
      ## renaming fish7/8/5 
      if(trym[nn] == "fish"){
        output$var_to_add
        i1 <- grep("7CENTROMERE",  output$var_to_add, value = F)
        output$var_to_add[i1] <- unlist(lapply(seq_len(length(i1)), function(ii) {
          paste0("", strsplit(output$var_to_add[i1[ii]], "7CENTROMERE")[[1]][1], "", "CHR7_ABN", strsplit(output$var_to_add[i1[ii]], "7CENTROMERE")[[1]][2])
        }))
        
        
        i1 <- grep("8CENTROMERE",  output$var_to_add, value = F)
        output$var_to_add[i1] <- unlist(lapply(seq_len(length(i1)), function(ii) {
          
          paste0("", strsplit(output$var_to_add[i1[ii]], "8CENTROMERE")[[1]][1], "", "CHR8_ABN", strsplit(output$var_to_add[i1[ii]], "8CENTROMERE")[[1]][2])
        }))
        
        
        i1 <- grep("EGR1",  output$var_to_add, value = F)
        
        output$var_to_add[i1] <- unlist(lapply(seq_len(length(i1)), function(ii) {
          
          
          paste0("", strsplit(output$var_to_add[i1[ii]], "EGR1")[[1]][1], "", "CHR5_ABN", strsplit(output$var_to_add[i1[ii]], "EGR1")[[1]][2])
        }))
        
      }
     
      p1 <- output$p1
      p2 <- output$p2
      p3 <- output$p3
      p4 <- output$p4
      p5 <- output$p5
      
      m1 <- output$m1
      m2 <- output$m2
      m3 <- output$m3
      m4 <- output$m4
      m5 <- output$m5
      tm <- output$tm
      
      m1b <- output$m1b
      m2b <- output$m2b
      m3b <- output$m3b
      m4b <- output$m4b
      m5b <- output$m5b
      
      q025 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.025)}
      q975 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.975)}
      q025 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.25)}
      q075 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.75)}
      q050 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.50)}
      
      
      delme <- grep("DEM_", output$dat$Variable, value = F)
      if(mmis[oo] == "catg" & trym[nn] == "fish"){
        output$var_to_add <- c(output$var_to_add[output$var_to_add %!in% c("FISH_MLLT3_NORMAL")])
        delme <- c(grep("DEM_", output$dat$Variable, value = F))
      }
      
      v1 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ1")
      v2 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ2")
      v3 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ3")
      v4 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ4")
      v5 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ5")
      
      try(rm(ii))
      
     
      for(ii in seq_len(length(v1))){
        
        # uq1
        QQ <- paste0("try(", v1[ii], " <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(length(m1b)), function(uu) {
            m1b[[uu]][[",ii,"]]
          })))") 
        QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
        
        # uq2
        QQ <- paste0("", v2[ii], " <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(length(m2b)), function(uu) {
            m2b[[uu]][[",ii,"]]
          }))") 
        QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
      }
      
      alltd <- list()
      
      if(trym[nn] == "mut"){
        RR1 <- unlist(lapply(seq_len( length(output$var_to_add[-delme]) ), function(jj) strsplit(output$var_to_add[-delme][jj], title_tryme2[nn])[[1]][1]))
        RR2 <- ifelse(RR1 %in% c("NPM1", "IDH1", "IDH2", "FLT3", "CEBPA", "KIT", "JAK2", "FLT3ITD"), "PCR/NGS", 
                      ifelse(RR1 == "TP53", "FISH/NGS", 
                             ifelse(RR1 %in% c("CBFB", "EGR1", "MLL", "EFR1", "KMT2A", "KMT2A(MLL)"), "FISH/PCR", 
                                    ifelse(RR1 %in% c("PML", "RUNX", "BCRABL"), "FISH/PCR/NGS", NA))))
        var_name <- c(rep("", length(delme)), paste0("", RR2, "-", RR1, ""))
      } else{
        var_name <- c(rep("", length(delme)), unlist(lapply(seq_len( length(output$var_to_add[-delme]) ), function(jj) strsplit(output$var_to_add[-delme][jj], title_tryme2[nn])[[1]][2]))) 
      }
      
      
      for(ii in seq_len(length(v1))[-delme]){
        if(mmis[oo] != "catg"){
          if(is.list(tm)){
            tm <- tm[[1]]
          }
          QQ <- paste0("alltd[[",ii,"]] <- data.frame(Risk = c(m1[[",ii,"]], m2[[",ii,"]]), Days = rep(tm, 2),
                    Var = c(rep('(+ve)', length(tm)), rep('(-ve)', length(tm))),
                    Name = rep('", output$var_to_add[ii], "', 2 * length(tm)), 
                    Median = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q050), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q050)),
                    Lower = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q025), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q025)),
                    Upper = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q975), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q975)))")
        } else if(mmis[oo] == "catg"){
          QQ <- paste0("alltd[[",ii,"]] <- data.frame(Risk = c(m1[[",ii,"]], m2[[",ii,"]]), Days = rep(tm, 2),
                    Var = c(rep('(+ve)', length(tm)), rep('(-ve)', length(tm))),
                    Name = rep('", output$var_to_add[ii], "', 2 * length(tm)), 
                     Median = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q050), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q050)),
                    Lower = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q025), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q025)),
                    Upper = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q975), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q975)))")
        } 
        
        QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
        QQ <- QQ[which(QQ$Days <= 100), ]
        
        
        alltd1 <- QQ[QQ$Var == "(-ve)",]
        alltd2 <- QQ[QQ$Var == "(+ve)",]  
        
        mh <- c(5, 10, 15, 30, 50)
        mhd <- unlist(lapply(seq_len(length(mh)), function(pp) {
          a1 <- QQ$Days - mh[pp]
          a1[which(a1 > 0)] <- - 99999
          QQ$Days[which(a1 == max(a1))[1]]
        }))
        alltd3 <- QQ[which(QQ$Days %in% mhd & QQ$Var == "(-ve)"), ]
        alltd4 <- QQ[which(QQ$Days %in% mhd & QQ$Var == "(+ve)"), ]
        alltd3$Risk_CI <- paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd3$Risk), "[", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd3$Median), "] (", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd3$Lower), ",", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd3$Upper), ")")
        alltd4$Risk_CI <- paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd4$Risk), "[", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd4$Median), "] (", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd4$Lower), ",", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd4$Upper), ")")
        
        
        gtl <- stats::ks.test(x = alltd2$Risk,  y = alltd1$Risk,  alternative = "less")
        gtl_med <- stats::ks.test(x = alltd2$Median,  y = alltd1$Risk,  alternative = "less")
        gtg <- stats::ks.test(x = alltd2$Risk,  y = alltd1$Risk,  alternative = "greater")
        gtg_med <- stats::ks.test(x = alltd2$Median,  y = alltd1$Risk,  alternative = "greater")
        
        ## legend save 
        setwd(paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/plots/hazard_risk/", data_type,"/missing_", mmis[oo],"/risk_", mmod[mm],"_", trym[nn],"/"))
        png(paste0("", output$var_to_add[ii],"_RISK.png"), width = 700, height = 500, pointsize = 20)
        
        ## Adding median over 10000 bootstrap risk values 
        QQ1 <- QQ2 <- QQ
        QQ1$Var <- paste0("", QQ$Var, ":Median")
        QQ2$Var <- paste0("", QQ$Var, "")
        
        QQ_long <- rbind(QQ1, QQ2)
        QQ_long$Risk[seq_len(nrow(QQ))] <- QQ$Median
        QQ_long <- QQ_long %>% mutate(Var = fct_relevel(Var, c("(-ve)", "(-ve):Median", "(+ve)",  "(+ve):Median")), 
                                      Var = relevel(Var, ref = "(-ve)"))
        
        col = c("olivedrab4", "darkgreen", "orange", "darkorange4") 
        p <- ggplot(data = QQ_long, aes(x = Days, y = Risk, colour = Var, size = 5)) +
          geom_line(lwd = c(1.2)) +
          xlab("Time (days) post-treatment") +
          ylab("Marginal risk") +
          scale_color_manual(values = c(col[1], col[2], col[3], col[4])) + 
          ggtitle(paste0("", title_tryme[nn],":", var_name[ii], "")) 
        
        p <- p +  expand_limits(y = 0) +                        # Expand y range
          scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, round(max(alltd[[ii]]$Days)), by = 5)) + # Set tick by 4ms interval
          scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1))
        p <- p + theme_bw(base_size = 22) +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(color = "Black", size = 22, face = "bold"),
                plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
                axis.text.x =  element_text(color = "black", size = 22),
                axis.text.y =  element_text(color = "black", size = 22),
                axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 20, face = "bold"),
                axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 20, face = "bold"),
                axis.ticks.length = unit(0.16, "cm"),
                legend.position = "none")
        
        
        p <- p + geom_ribbon(data = alltd1, aes(x = Days, ymin = alltd1$Lower,
                                                ymax = alltd1$Upper),
                             inherit.aes = FALSE,
                             alpha = 0.3, fill = col[1])
        
        p <- p + geom_ribbon(data = alltd2, aes(x = Days, ymin = alltd2$Lower,
                                                ymax = alltd2$Upper),
                             inherit.aes = FALSE,
                             alpha = 0.4, fill = col[3])
        xax <- 50
        p <- p + geom_text(aes(x = xax, y = 0.60, label = paste0("5d  :: ", alltd3$Risk_CI[1], " | ", alltd4$Risk_CI[1], "")), 
                           color = c("black"), size = 4.5) +
          geom_text(aes(x = xax, y = 0.54, label = paste0("10d  :: ", alltd3$Risk_CI[2], " | ", alltd4$Risk_CI[2], "")), 
                    color = c("black"), size = 4.5) + 
          geom_text(aes(x = xax, y = 0.48, label = paste0("15d :: ", alltd3$Risk_CI[3], " | ", alltd4$Risk_CI[3], "")), 
                    color = c("black"), size = 4.5) + 
          geom_text(aes(x = xax, y = 0.42, label = paste0("30d :: ", alltd3$Risk_CI[4], " | ", alltd4$Risk_CI[4], "")), 
                    color = c("black"), size = 4.5) + 
          geom_text(aes(x = xax, y = 0.36, label = paste0("50d :: ", alltd3$Risk_CI[5], " | ", alltd4$Risk_CI[5], "")), 
                    color = c("black"), size = 4.5) + 
          geom_text(aes(x = 40, y = 1, label = paste0("Kalmogrov-Smirnov (+ve < -ve) = ", sprintf("%0.3f", gtl$p.value), "[", sprintf("%0.3f", gtl_med$p.value), "] | (-ve < +ve) = ", sprintf("%0.3f", gtg$p.value), "[", sprintf("%0.3f", gtg_med$p.value), "]")), 
                    color = c("black"), size = 4.5) +
          geom_text(aes(x = xax, y = 0.65, label = paste0(" (-ve)                       (+ve)    ")), 
                    color = c("black"), size = 4.5) 
        
        print(p)
        dev.off()   
        
        
      }
      
    }   # oo
  } ## nn
} ## mm
```

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', out.width = "300%"}
QQ <- list.files('/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/plots/hazard_risk/all/missing_catg/risk_censct_fc/')
QQ <- QQ[grep("FC", QQ, value = F)]
GG <- paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/plots/hazard_risk/all/missing_catg/risk_censct_fc/", QQ, "", sep = "")
knitr::include_graphics(c(GG))
```

# Covariate level classification based on different rules
The cut-offs of risk differences between (+ve) and (-ve) are set as <-15%, [-15%, -7%), (7%, 15%], and >15% to categorize as strongly and moderately favorable (positively associated) and poor (negatively associated) prognostic features. 
```{r, eval = FALSE}
catg <- list()
for(mm in 1 : length(mmod)){
  catg[[mm]] <- list()
  
  for(nn in 1 : length(trym)){
    catg[[mm]][[nn]] <- list()
    
    for(oo in 1 : length(mmis)) { 
      catg[[mm]][[nn]][[oo]] <- list()
      
      for(ff in 1 : 1){ ## ff = 10 for CV 
        catg[[mm]][[nn]][[oo]][[ff]] <- list() # comment out for all 
        
        
        try(rm(output))
        
        if(data_type == "all"){
          GG <- paste0("readRDS('/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/run_va_", mmod[mm],"_", 
                       os_type,"_varisk_", trym[nn], "_", mmis[oo],"_cfact.rds')")
          GG <- eval(parse(text = GG))
          
          QQ <- paste0("output <- GG")
          QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
          
        } else if(data_type == "cv"){
          GG <- paste0("readRDS('/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/cv", ff,"/run_va_", mmod[mm],"_", os_type,"_varisk_", trym[nn], "_", mmis[oo],"_cfact.rds')")
          GG <- eval(parse(text = GG ))
          
          QQ <- paste0("output <- GG")
          QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
        } 
        
        
        
        p1 <- output$p1
        p2 <- output$p2
        p3 <- output$p3
        p4 <- output$p4
        p5 <- output$p5
        
        m1 <- output$m1
        m2 <- output$m2
        m3 <- output$m3
        m4 <- output$m4
        m5 <- output$m5
        tm <- output$tm
        
        m1b <- output$m1b
        m2b <- output$m2b
        m3b <- output$m3b
        m4b <- output$m4b
        m5b <- output$m5b
        
        q025 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.025)}
        q975 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.975)}
        q025 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.25)}
        q075 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.75)}
        q050 <- function(qq) {quantile(qq, 0.50)}
        
        
        delme <- grep("DEM_", output$dat$Variable, value = F)
        if(mmis[oo] == "catg" & trym[nn] == "fish"){
          output$var_to_add <- c(output$var_to_add[output$var_to_add %!in% c("FISH_MLLT3_NORMAL")])
          delme <- c(grep("DEM_", output$dat$Variable, value = F))
        }
        
        v1 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ1")
        v2 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ2")
        v3 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ3")
        v4 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ4")
        v5 <- paste0("", output$var_to_add, "_UQ5")
        
        try(rm(ii))
       
        for(ii in seq_len(length(v1))){
          
          # uq1
          QQ <- paste0("try(", v1[ii], " <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(length(m1b)), function(uu) {
                  m1b[[uu]][[",ii,"]]
                })))") 
          QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
          
          # uq2
          QQ <- paste0("", v2[ii], " <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(length(m2b)), function(uu) {
                    m2b[[uu]][[",ii,"]]
                  }))") 
          QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
          
          
        }
        
        alltd <- list()
        
        
        if(trym[nn] == "mut"){
          RR1 <- unlist(lapply(seq_len( length(output$var_to_add[-delme]) ), function(jj) strsplit(output$var_to_add[-delme][jj], title_tryme2[nn])[[1]][1]))
          RR2 <- ifelse(RR1 %in% c("NPM1", "IDH1", "IDH2", "FLT3", "CEBPA", "KIT", "JAK2", "FLT3ITD"), "PCR/NGS", 
                        ifelse(RR1 == "TP53", "FISH/NGS", 
                               ifelse(RR1 %in% c("CBFB", "EGR1", "MLL", "EFR1", "KMT2A", "KMT2A(MLL)"), "FISH/PCR", 
                                      ifelse(RR1 %in% c("PML", "RUNX", "BCRABL"), "FISH/PCR/NGS", NA))))
          var_name <- c(rep("", length(delme)), paste0("", RR2, "-", RR1, ""))
        } else{
          
          var_name <- c(rep("", length(delme)), unlist(lapply(seq_len( length(output$var_to_add[-delme]) ), 
                                                              function(jj) strsplit(output$var_to_add[-delme][jj], title_tryme2[nn])[[1]][2]))) 
        }
        
        
        catg[[mm]][[nn]][[oo]][[ff]] <- try(do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(length(v1))[-delme], function(ii) {
          
          # for(ii in seq_len(length(v1))[-delme]) {
          
          if(mmis[oo] != "catg"){
            if(is.list(tm)){
              tm <- tm[[1]]
            }
            
            FF1 <- paste0("sumy(output$data$",  output$var_to_add[ii], ")")
            FF1 <- eval(parse(text = FF1))
            
            FF2 <- paste0("sumn(output$data$",  output$var_to_add[ii], ")")
            FF2 <- eval(parse(text = FF2))
            
            FF <- FF1 / (FF1 + FF2)
            
            QQ <- paste0("alltd[[",ii,"]] <- data.frame(Risk = c(m1[[",ii,"]], m2[[",ii,"]]), Days = rep(tm, 2),
                    Var = c(rep('(+ve)', length(tm)), rep('(-ve)', length(tm))),
                    Name = rep('", output$var_to_add[ii], "', 2 * length(tm)), 
                     Total_y =  rep('", FF, "', 2 * length(tm)), 
                    Mean = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, mean), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, mean)),
                    Median = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q050), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q050)),
                    Lower = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q025), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q025)),
                    Upper = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q975), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q975)))")
          } else if(mmis[oo] == "catg"){
            
            FF1 <- paste0("sumy(output$data$",  output$var_to_add[ii], ")")
            FF1 <- eval(parse(text = FF1))
            
            FF2 <- paste0("sumn(output$data$",  output$var_to_add[ii], ")")
            FF2 <- eval(parse(text = FF2))
            
            FF <- FF1 / (FF1 + FF2)
            
            QQ <- paste0("alltd[[",ii,"]] <- data.frame(Risk = c(m1[[",ii,"]], m2[[",ii,"]]), Days = rep(tm, 2),
                    Var = c(rep('(+ve)', length(tm)), rep('(-ve)', length(tm))),
                    Name = rep('", output$var_to_add[ii], "', 2 * length(tm)), 
                    Total_y =  rep('", FF, "', 2 * length(tm)), 
                    Mean = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, mean), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, mean)),
                    Median = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q050), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q050)),
                    Lower = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q025), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q025)),
                    Upper = c(apply(", v1[ii],", 2, q975), apply(", v2[ii],", 2, q975)))")
          } 
          
          QQ <- eval(parse(text = QQ))
          QQ <- QQ[which(QQ$Days <= 100), ]
          
          
          alltd1 <- QQ[QQ$Var == "(-ve)",]
          alltd2 <- QQ[QQ$Var == "(+ve)",]  
          
         
          mh <- c(5, 10, 15, 30, 50) 
          mhd <- unlist(lapply(seq_len(length(mh)), function(pp) {
            a1 <- QQ$Days - mh[pp]
            a1[which(a1 > 0)] <- - 99999
            QQ$Days[which(a1 == max(a1))[1]]
          }))
          alltd3 <- QQ[which(QQ$Days %in% mhd & QQ$Var == "(-ve)"), ]
          alltd4 <- QQ[which(QQ$Days %in% mhd & QQ$Var == "(+ve)"), ]
          alltd3$Risk_CI <- paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd3$Risk), "[", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd3$Median), "] (", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd3$Lower), ",", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd3$Upper), ")")
          alltd4$Risk_CI <- paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd4$Risk), "[", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd4$Median), "] (", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd4$Lower), ",", sprintf("%0.2f", alltd4$Upper), ")")
          
          
          gtl <- stats::ks.test(x = alltd2$Risk,  y = alltd1$Risk,  alternative = "less")
          gtl_med <- stats::ks.test(x = alltd2$Median,  y = alltd1$Risk,  alternative = "less")
          gtg <- stats::ks.test(x = alltd2$Risk,  y = alltd1$Risk,  alternative = "greater")
          gtg_med <- stats::ks.test(x = alltd2$Median,  y = alltd1$Risk,  alternative = "greater")
          
          
          grpt1 <- -0.15 #-0.10
          grpt2 <- -0.07 #-0.05
          grpt3 <- 0
          
          grpt4 <- 0.07 #0.05
          grpt5 <- 0.15 #0.10
          
          
          vl <- alltd4$Risk[ ifelse(os_type == "os", 4, ifelse (os_type == "efs", 3, NA)) ] - 
            alltd3$Risk[ ifelse(os_type == "os", 4, ifelse (os_type == "efs", 3, NA)) ]
          vl_median <- alltd4$Median[ ifelse(os_type == "os", 4, ifelse (os_type == "efs", 3, NA)) ] - 
            alltd3$Median[ ifelse(os_type == "os", 4, ifelse (os_type == "efs", 3, NA)) ]
          vl_mean <- alltd4$Mean[ ifelse(os_type == "os", 4, ifelse (os_type == "efs", 3, NA)) ] - 
            alltd3$Mean[ ifelse(os_type == "os", 4, ifelse (os_type == "efs", 3, NA)) ]
          
          a1 <- ifelse(vl <= grpt1, "Strongly favorable",
                       ifelse(vl > grpt1 & vl <= grpt2, "Moderately favorable",
                              ifelse(vl > grpt2 & vl <= grpt3, "Neutral signaling favorability",
                                     ifelse(vl > grpt3 & vl <= grpt4, "Neutral signaling adversity",
                                            ifelse(vl > grpt4 & vl <= grpt5, "Moderately adverse",
                                                   ifelse(vl > grpt5, "Strongly adverse", NA))))))
          
          
          a3 <- ifelse(vl_median <= grpt1, "Strongly favorable",
                       ifelse(vl_median > grpt1 & vl_median <= grpt2, "Moderately favorable",
                              ifelse(vl_median > grpt2 & vl_median <= grpt3, "Neutral signaling favorability",
                                     ifelse(vl_median > grpt3 & vl_median <= grpt4, "Neutral signaling adversity",
                                            ifelse(vl_median > grpt4 & vl_median <= grpt5, "Moderately adverse",
                                                   ifelse(vl_median > grpt5, "Strongly adverse", NA))))))
          
          
          a4 <- ifelse(vl_mean <= grpt1, "Strongly favorable",
                       ifelse(vl_mean > grpt1 & vl_mean <= grpt2, "Moderately favorable",
                              ifelse(vl_mean > grpt2 & vl_mean <= grpt3, "Neutral signaling favorability",
                                 ifelse(vl_mean > grpt3 & vl_mean <= grpt4, "Neutral signaling adversity",
                                            ifelse(vl_mean > grpt4 & vl_mean <= grpt5, "Moderately adverse",
                                                   ifelse(vl_mean > grpt5, "Strongly adverse", NA))))))
          
          a2 <- output$var_to_add[ii]
          data.frame("Variable" = a2, "Values" = a1, "Values_median" = a3, "Values_mean" = a4)
        })))
        
      }}
  }
}

setwd(paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/"))
saveRDS(catg, file = paste0("catg_", os_type,"_", data_type,".rds"))
```

```{r}
fct <- c(TRUE, FALSE)
mmod <- c("censct")
trym <- c("fc", "ngs", "fish", "cyt", "mut")
title_tryme <- c("FC", "NGS", "FISH", "CYT", "AML mutation")
title_tryme2 <- c("FC_", "NGS_", "FISH_", "CYT_", "_MUTATION")
mmis <- c("catg")
good_defm <- c("no_neutral")

os_type = c("os")
risk_df_new <- 1

for(ll in 1){
  for(pp in 1 : 2){
    for(oo in 1 : length(mmis)){
      for(mm in 1 : length(mmod)){
        for(rul in 1 : 4) {
        
        if(rul == 1){ # rule-1
          QQ <- readRDS(paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/RISK_DF_FC_", 
                               fct[pp],"_CD71_No_", mmis[oo], "_", mmod[mm],"_", good_defm[1],".rds")) # rule-1 & 3
          risk_df <- QQ$risk_df
        } else if(rul == 2){ # rule-2
          QQ <- readRDS(paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/RISK_DF_FC_", 
                               fct[pp],"_CD71_5PY_", mmis[oo], "_", mmod[mm],"_", good_defm[1],".rds"))
          risk_df <- QQ$risk_df
        } else if(rul == 3){ # rule-3
          QQ <- readRDS(paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/RISK_DF_FC_", 
                               fct[pp],"_CD71_No_", mmis[oo], "_", mmod[mm],"_", good_defm[1],".rds"))
          risk_df <- QQ$risk_df_edit
        } else if(rul == 4){ # rule-4
          QQ <- readRDS(paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/RISK_DF_FC_", 
                               fct[pp],"_CD71_5PY_", mmis[oo], "_", mmod[mm],"_", good_defm[1],".rds"))
          risk_df <- QQ$risk_df_edit
        }
        
        risk_df$Name <- rep(paste0("surv:", os_type[ll], " rule:" , rul," & FC:", fct[pp], " & missing:", mmis[oo], 
                                   " & censor:", mmod[mm],""), nrow(risk_df))
        risk_df_new <- rbind(risk_df_new, risk_df)
       }
     }
    }
  }
}  
risk_df_new_os <- risk_df_new
risk_df_new_os$Surv <- rep("OS", nrow(risk_df_new_os))
risk_df_new <- risk_df_new_os[-1, ]

uq1 <- unique(c(as.character(risk_df_new$Strongly.adverse), as.character(risk_df_new$Moderately.adverse), 
                as.character(risk_df_new$Strongly.favorable), as.character(risk_df_new$Moderately.favorable)))
uq1 <- uq1[is.na(uq1) == FALSE]
uq1_nm <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/name.rds")$name_va
uq1_ty <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/name.rds")$type_va

uq1_sub_nm <- unlist(lapply(seq_len(length(uq1)), function(ii) uq1_nm[which(uq1_ty == uq1[ii])] ))

vq1 <- unique(risk_df_new$Name)
vq1 <- vq1[vq1 %!in% "1"]

bvl <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(uq1), ncol = length(vq1))
rownames(bvl) <- NULL
for(jj in 1 : length(uq1)){
  for(kk in 1 : length(vq1)){
    
    ab <- risk_df_new[which(risk_df_new$Name == vq1[kk]), 1 : 4]
    if(length(which(apply(ab, 2, function(gg) length(which(gg %in% uq1[jj]))) == 1)) > 0){
      vl <- colnames(ab)[which(apply(ab, 2, function(gg) length(which(gg %in% uq1[jj]))) == 1)]
      bvl[jj, kk] <- ifelse(vl == "Strongly.adverse", "Strongly adverse", 
                            ifelse(vl == "Moderately.adverse", "Moderately adverse",
                                   ifelse(vl == "Moderately.favorable", "Moderately favorable", 
                                          ifelse(vl == "Strongly.favorable", "Strongly favorable", "Null/marginal effect"))))
    } else{
      bvl[jj, kk] <- "Null/marginal effect"
    }
    
  }
}
bvl2 <- data.frame("Factors" = uq1_sub_nm,
                   "Type" = uq1,
                   "Phenotypic & Genetic|Rule:1" = bvl[, 1],
                   "Phenotypic & Genetic|Rule:2" = bvl[, 2],
                   "Phenotypic & Genetic|Rule:3" = bvl[, 3],
                   "Phenotypic & Genetic|Rule:4" = bvl[, 4],
                   "Genetic|Rule:1" = bvl[, 5],
                   "Genetic|Rule:2" = bvl[, 6], 
                   "Genetic|Rule:3" = bvl[, 7], 
                   "Genetic|Rule:2" = bvl[, 8])

bvl2 <- bvl2[order(c(grep("FC_", bvl2$Type, value = F), grep("NGS_", bvl2$Type, value = F),
                     grep("CYT_", bvl2$Type, value = F), grep("FISH_", bvl2$Type, value = F),
                     grep("_MUTATION", bvl2$Type, value = F))), ][, -2]


dat <- reshape2::melt(as.data.frame(bvl2), id.var = 'Factors')
dat <- data.frame("Factors" = dat$Factors, "Model" = dat$variable, "Importance" = dat$value)
dat$Importance  <-  factor(dat$Importance, levels = c('Strongly adverse', 'Moderately adverse', 'Moderately favorable', 
                                                      'Strongly favorable', "Null/marginal effect"))
dat$Model <- factor(dat$Model)

dat$Type <- NA
dat$Type[grep(":FC", dat$Factors, value = F)] <- "FC"
dat$Type[grep(":NGS", dat$Factors, value = F)] <- "NGS"
dat$Type[grep(":FISH", dat$Factors, value = F)] <- "FISH"
dat$Type[grep(":CYT", dat$Factors, value = F)] <- "CYT"
dat$Type[which(dat$Factors %in% c("IDH2:NGS/PCR", "IDH1:NGS/PCR", "TP53:FISH/NGS", "NPM1:PCR/NGS", "FLT3:NGS/PCR", 
                                  "FLT3ITD:NGS/PCR", "KIT:NGS/PCR", "JAK2:NGS/PCR",
                                  "CEBPA:NGS/PCR"))] <- "Mutation"
dat$Type  <-  factor(dat$Type, levels = c('FC', 'NGS', 'FISH', 'CYT', 'Mutation'))
bg <- order(as.character(dat$Type))
dat <- dat[bg, ]

p <- ggplot(dat[bg, ], aes(x  = Model, y = reorder(Factors, bg))) + geom_tile(aes(fill = Importance)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Null/marginal effect" = 'gray', "Strongly favorable" = 'darkgreen', 
                               "Moderately favorable" = 'green2',"Moderately adverse" = 'orange', 
                               "Strongly adverse" = 'darkred')) + theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  
  scale_color_identity() + ylab("Factors") + xlab("") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(paste0("Phenotypic & Genetic|Rule:1"),
                              "Phenotypic & Genetic|Rule:2",
                              "Phenotypic & Genetic|Rule:3",
                              "Phenotypic & Genetic|Rule:4",
                              "Genetic|Rule:1", 
                              "Genetic|Rule:2", 
                              "Genetic|Rule:3", 
                              "Genetic|Rule:4")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 30),
        axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 30),
        
        panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.5, color = "white"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "white"),
        
        axis.title.x = NULL,
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 17),
        
        legend.title = element_text(size = 17),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 17),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17))

print(p)
```

# Subject level classification 
Subject-level classification into Adverse, Intermediate, and Favorable was performed for all 200 subjects. 

```{r, eval = FALSE}
## Rule-1 & Rule-3 phenotypic & genetic + phenotypic
for(mm in 1 : length(mmod)){ # type of allo-HCT adjustment
  for(oo in 1 : length(mmis) ){  # missing data methods
    for(pp in 1  : length(fct)){ # genetic/phenotypic
      for(gg in 1 : 1) {
        
        mm <- oo <- 1; gg <- 1
        
        setwd(paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/"))
        catg <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/catg_os_all.rds")
        mcatg <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(length(title_tryme)), function(ll) {
          frm <- try(catg[[mm]][[ll]][[oo]][[1]])
          if(class(frm) %!in% "try-error"){
            catg[[mm]][[ll]][[oo]][[1]]
          } 
        }))
    
        i1_catg <- paste0("dd", 1:30, "") # 30 test subjects ID
       
        system.time(findkm_riskgroup_paperML(mcatg, fc_include = fct[pp], 
                                os_type = "os (ELN) + pairwise", mis_type = mmis[oo], cen_type = mmod[mm], 
                                 global_var = NULL, good_def = good_defm[gg], exclude_cd71 = "No", 
                                 data_type = "predictive (cv)", 
                                 test_ix = i1_catg, t_max = 100, tux = seq(5, 50, by = 10), 
                                 vrm = c("DEM_AGE_RANGE", "DEM_SEX", "MOD_RISK", "MOD_RISK_EDIT"), 
                                 getd = "/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds"))
          
      }}}}

## Rule-2 & Rule-4 phenotypic & genetic + phenotypic
for(mm in 1 : length(mmod)){ # type of allo-HCT adjustment
  for(oo in 1 : length(mmis) ){  # missing data methods
    for(pp in 1  : length(fct)){ # genetic/phenotypic
      for(gg in 1 : 1) {
        
        mm <- oo <- 1; gg <- 1
        
        setwd(paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/"))
        catg <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/catg_os_all.rds")
        mcatg <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(length(title_tryme)), function(ll) {
          frm <- try(catg[[mm]][[ll]][[oo]][[1]])
          if(class(frm) %!in% "try-error"){
            catg[[mm]][[ll]][[oo]][[1]]
          } 
        }))
        
        i1_catg <- paste0("dd", 1:30, "")
       
        system.time(findkm_riskgroup_paperML(mcatg, fc_include = fct[pp], 
                                os_type = "os (ELN) + pairwise", mis_type = mmis[oo], cen_type = mmod[mm], 
                                 global_var = NULL, good_def = good_defm[gg], exclude_cd71 = "5PY", 
                                 data_type = "predictive (cv)", 
                                 test_ix = i1_catg, t_max = 100, tux = seq(5, 50, by = 10), 
                                 vrm = c("DEM_AGE_RANGE", "DEM_SEX", "MOD_RISK", "MOD_RISK_EDIT"), 
                                 getd = "/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds"))
      }}}}
```

# Numerical assessment {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}
Numerical performance of the risk models was evaluated in terms of equitability, separability, conformity, and predictability. For simplicity, we split the dataset into 85% of patients for training and 15% for the validation set to evaluate the predictive metric. The information of all 200 patients was used to determine the covariate-level classification and evaluate equitability, separability, and conformity as depicted in the paper for internal validation. However, for external validation, although not depicted here for the purpose of simplicity in exposition, the training and validation sets were completely separated. For brevity, results are reported only for one model; however, using the same intuition, other results can be reproduced. 

## Features
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', out.width = "300%"}
options(warn = -1)
name <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/name.rds")
type_va <- unlist(name$type_va)
name_va <- unlist(name$name_va)

bl <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/RISK_DF_FC_TRUE_CD71_5PY_catg_censct_no_neutral.rds")

f1 <- unique(c(bl$sf, bl$mf))
f1 <- f1[which(is.na(f1) == FALSE)]
f1 <- name_va[match(f1, type_va)]
sum_f1 <- length(f1)
f1 <- paste0("", f1, "", collapse = ", ")

a1 <- unique(c(bl$sa, bl$ma))
a1 <- a1[which(is.na(a1) == FALSE)]
a1 <- name_va[match(a1, type_va)]
sum_a1 <- length(a1)
a1 <- paste0("", a1, "", collapse = ", ")

result <- data.frame("Category" = c("Favorable", "Intermediate", "Adverse"),
                     "Features" = c(
                       paste0("Any of ", f1, " (in the absence of any Adverse features)"),
                       paste0("No Favorable or Adverse features, or >=1 Favorable features with >=1 Adverse features"),
                       paste0("Any of ", a1, " (in the absence of any Favorable features)")
                     ), 
                     "Total # of features" = c(sum_f1, NA, sum_a1))

DT::datatable(result, rownames = FALSE, colnames = c("Category", "Features", "Total # of features"), options = list(info = FALSE)) %>% 
  formatStyle('Category',
              backgroundColor = styleEqual(
                c("Favorable", "Intermediate", "Adverse"),
                c("seagreen", "salmon", "lightblue")
              ),
              fontWeight = 'bold'
  )
```

## Equitability
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', out.width = "300%"}
options(warn = -1)
KMdata <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/KMdata.rds")
tt1 <- table(bl$test_risk)
tt2 <- tt1 / sum(tt1)

tt3 <- table(bl$test_risk[- which(KMdata$SCT_FLAG %!in% "ven/aza")]) # excluding all
tt4 <- tt3 / sum(tt3)

result1 <- data.frame("Category" = c("Favorable", "Intermediate", "Adverse"),
                      "Frequency with allo-HCT" = c( paste0("", tt1, " / ", sum(tt1), " (",  sprintf("%0.0f", tt2 * 100), " %)") ),
                      "Frequency without allo-HCT" = c( paste0("", tt3, " / ", sum(tt3), " (",  sprintf("%0.0f", tt4 * 100), " %)") )
)


DT::datatable(result1, rownames = FALSE, colnames = c("Category", "Frequency with allo-HCT (%)", "Frequency without allo-HCT (%)"), 
              options = list(info = FALSE)) %>% 
  formatStyle('Category',
              backgroundColor = styleEqual(
                c("Favorable", "Intermediate", "Adverse"),
                c("seagreen", "salmon", "lightblue")
              ),
              fontWeight = 'bold'
  )

```

## Separability
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', out.width = "300%"}
options(warn = -1)
QQ <- list.files('/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/')
QQ <- QQ[c(grep("MOD_RISK_MERGED_FC_TRUE_CD71_5PY_catg_censct_no_neutral", QQ, value = F), 
           grep("ELN_MERGED_FC_TRUE_CD71_5PY_catg_censct_no_neutral", QQ, value = F))]
GG <- paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/", QQ, "", sep = "")
knitr::include_graphics(c(GG))
```

## Conformity
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', out.width = "300%"}
options(warn = -1)
QQ <- list.files('/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/')
QQ <- QQ[c(grep("MOD_RISK_MERGED_Adverse risk_FC_TRUE_CD71_5PY_catg_censct_no_neutral", QQ, value = F), 
         grep("MOD_RISK_MERGED_Intermediate risk_FC_TRUE_CD71_5PY_catg_censct_no_neutral", QQ, value = F),
         grep("MOD_RISK_MERGED_Favorable risk_FC_TRUE_CD71_5PY_catg_censct_no_neutral", QQ, value = F)
         )]
GG <- paste0("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/", QQ, "", sep = "")
knitr::include_graphics(c(GG))

kr <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/MOD_RISK_MERGED_KAPPA_FC_FALSE_CD71_5PY_catg_censct_no_neutral.rds")
ikp2 <- kr$ikp2
# kr$ikp2$detail %>%
#   kbl(digits = 2) %>%
#   kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))

result1 <- data.frame("Category" = c("Favorable", "Intermediate", "Adverse"),
                             "Kappa (P-value)" = c( paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", ikp2$detail[which(rownames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Favorable"), which(colnames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Kappa")] ), " (",
                                                           sprintf("%0.4f", ikp2$detail[which(rownames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Favorable"), which(colnames(ikp2$detail) %in% "p.value")] ), ")"),
                                                    
                                                    paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", ikp2$detail[which(rownames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Intermediate"), which(colnames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Kappa")] ), " (",
                                                           sprintf("%0.4f", ikp2$detail[which(rownames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Intermediate"), which(colnames(ikp2$detail) %in% "p.value")] ), ")"),
                                                    
                                                    paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", ikp2$detail[which(rownames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Adverse"), which(colnames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Kappa")] ), " (",
                                                           sprintf("%0.4f", ikp2$detail[which(rownames(ikp2$detail) %in% "Adverse"), which(colnames(ikp2$detail) %in% "p.value")] ), ")")
                             ), 
                             
                             "Global Kappa (P-value)" = c( NA, 
                                                           paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", ikp2$value), " (", sprintf("%0.4f", ikp2$p.value), " )", ""), 
                                                           NA)
       )

 DT::datatable(result1, rownames = FALSE, colnames = c("Category", "Kappa (P-value)", "Global-Kappa (P-value)"), 
                   options = list(info = FALSE)) %>%
       formatStyle('Category',
                   backgroundColor = styleEqual(
                     c("Favorable", "Intermediate", "Adverse"),
                     c("seagreen", "salmon", "lightblue")
                   ),
                   fontWeight = 'bold'
       ) 
 

```


## Predictability
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', out.width = "300%"}
options(warn = -1)
fitrdg <- readRDS("/mnt/filestore/bkt-dev-prj-dev-rfsci-shiny-nonprt-naz/illustration/rds/oos/RISK_DF_FC_TRUE_CD71_5PY_catg_censct_no_neutral.rds")

A <-  list("cauc_ridge" = median(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_025" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_25" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_75" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_975" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_t" = fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)


B <-    list("ibrier_ridge" = median(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_025" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_25" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_75" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_975" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_t" = fitrdg$ibrier_cridge, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)


C <-  list("iauc_ridge" = median(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_025" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_25" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_75" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_975" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_t" = fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)                       
                         
                         
A1 <-  list("cauc_ridge_eln" = median(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge_eln, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_eln_025" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge_eln, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_eln_25" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge_eln, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_eln_75" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge_eln, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_eln_975" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge_eln, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
           "cauc_ridge_eln_t" = fitrdg$t_survivalROC_ridge_eln, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)


B1 <-    list("ibrier_ridge_eln" = median(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge_eln, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_eln_025" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge_eln, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_eln_25" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge_eln, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_eln_75" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge_eln, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_eln_975" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_cridge_eln, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_ridge_eln_t" = fitrdg$ibrier_cridge_eln, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)


C1 <-  list("iauc_ridge_eln" = median(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge_eln, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_eln_025" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge_eln, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_eln_25" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge_eln, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_eln_75" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge_eln, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_eln_975" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge_eln, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
           "iauc_ridge_eln_t" = fitrdg$t_risksetROC_ridge_eln, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)


D <-    list("cauc_km" = median(fitrdg$t_survivalROC, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_025" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_25" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_75" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_975" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_t" = fitrdg$t_survivalROC, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)


E <-    list("ibrier_km" = median(fitrdg$ibrier, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_km_025" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_km_25" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_km_75" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_km_975" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_km_t" = fitrdg$ibrier, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)

F  <-  list("iauc_km" = median(fitrdg$t_risksetROC, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_025" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_25" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_75" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_975" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_t" = fitrdg$t_risksetROC, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)                      

D1 <-    list("cauc_km_eln" = median(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_eln, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_eln_025" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_eln, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_eln_25" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_eln, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_eln_75" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_eln, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_eln_975" = quantile(fitrdg$t_survivalROC_eln, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
             "cauc_km_eln_t" = fitrdg$t_survivalROC_eln, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)


E1 <-    list("ibrier_eln_km" = median(fitrdg$ibrier_eln, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_eln_km_025" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_eln, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_eln_km_25" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_eln, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_eln_km_75" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_eln, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_eln_km_975" = quantile(fitrdg$ibrier_eln, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
             "ibrier_eln_km_t" = fitrdg$ibrier_eln, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)

F1  <-  list("iauc_km_eln" = median(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_eln, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_eln_025" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_eln, 0.025, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_eln_25" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_eln, 0.25, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_eln_75" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_eln, 0.75, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_eln_975" = quantile(fitrdg$t_risksetROC_eln, 0.975, na.rm = T), 
            "iauc_km_eln_t" = fitrdg$t_risksetROC_eln, "tu" = fitrdg$tu)      

result2 <- data.frame(
           "Model" = c("mCOXr-RM", "KM-RM", "mCOXr-ELN", "KM-ELN"),
           
           "m-cAUC" = c(paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", A$cauc_ridge), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", A$cauc_ridge_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", A$cauc_ridge_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", D$cauc_km), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", D$cauc_km_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", D$cauc_km_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", A1$cauc_ridge_eln), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", A1$cauc_ridge_eln_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", A1$cauc_ridge_eln_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", D1$cauc_km_eln), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", D1$cauc_km_eln_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", D1$cauc_km_eln_975), "]")), 
           
           "m-iAUC" = c(paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", C$iauc_ridge), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", C$iauc_ridge_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", C$iauc_ridge_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", F$iauc_km), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", F$iauc_km_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", F$iauc_km_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", C1$iauc_ridge_eln), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", C1$iauc_ridge_eln_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", C1$iauc_ridge_eln_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", F1$iauc_km_eln), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", F1$iauc_km_eln_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", F1$iauc_km_eln_975), "]")), 
           
           "iBrier" = c(paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", B$ibrier_ridge), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", B$ibrier_ridge_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", B$ibrier_ridge_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", E$ibrier_km), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", E$ibrier_km_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", E$ibrier_km_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", B1$ibrier_ridge_eln), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", B1$ibrier_ridge_eln_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", B1$ibrier_ridge_eln_975), "]"),
                        paste0("", sprintf("%0.2f", E1$ibrier_eln_km), " [", sprintf("%0.2f", E1$ibrier_eln_km_025), ", ", sprintf("%0.2f", E1$ibrier_eln_km_975), "]"))
)
 

DT::datatable(result2, rownames = FALSE, colnames = c("Model", "M-cAUC (2.5, 97.5)", "M-iAUC (2.5, 97.5)", "iBrier (2.5, 97.5)"), 
                   options = list(info = FALSE)) %>%
       formatStyle('Model',
                   backgroundColor = styleEqual(
                    c("mCOXr-RM", "KM-RM", "mCOXr-ELN", "KM-ELN"),
                     c("lightyellow", "yellow", "pink", "salmon")
                   ),
                   fontWeight = 'bold'
       )
```
